conflicting_active_memory_rate.numerator_definition: cases with two active memories asserting conflicting values

correct_forget_target_rate.numerator_definition: forget actions targeting the expected memory

correct_memory_kind_rate.denominator_definition: applied creations matching an expected creation

correct_update_target_rate.numerator_definition: update actions targeting the expected memory

coverage_stop_rate_v2.numerator_definition: selections stopped before K for lack of positive utility

distinct_source_session_rate_v2.numerator_definition: distinct source sessions among selected memories

duplicate_acceptance_rate.numerator_definition: applied creations duplicating a previously active memory

experience_use_rate.denominator_definition: executed cases with at least one selected memory
experience_use_rate.numerator_definition: cases whose response uses at least one supplied memory concept

forget_detection_accuracy.numerator_definition: expected forgets where a forget action was proposed

forgotten_exclusion_rate.numerator_definition: post-forget answer turns whose supplied context contains no forgotten content

hit_at_k.numerator_definition: cases with at least one relevant memory selected

notes: experienceos_local_v2 and experienceos_hybrid_full_v2 use the scripted-simulated local proposal mode (deterministic plan serialized through the local-policy v2 pipeline); direct model inference is false and results are never real-model accuracy.
Real local-model evidence is stored separately under the development results root and is not part of this summary.
full_history has no candidate/selection denominators in the external artifact (untruncated history baseline).
experienceos_slots_v2 has no distinct external runner (recorded as unsupported in external provenance).
